name: The Fool
meaning_upright_long: A leap of faith invites new experiences and personal growth when embraced with curiosity.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Fool suggests reviewing hesitation, risk, recklessness.

name: The Magician
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: untapped potential, manipulation, distraction.
meaning_upright_long: Focused intention turns ideas into reality; align your skills with your will to create change.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Magician suggests reviewing untapped potential, manipulation, distraction.

name: The High Priestess
meaning_upright_long: Quiet reflection reveals hidden knowledge and invites trust in your inner wisdom.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The High Priestess suggests reviewing secrets, disconnection, doubt.

name: The Empress
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: creative block, dependence, neglect.
meaning_upright_long: A season of growth rewards compassion, creativity, and tending to what you cherish most.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Empress suggests reviewing creative block, dependence, neglect.

name: The Emperor
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: control, rigidity, power struggles.
meaning_upright_long: Clear boundaries and deliberate leadership bring lasting security when used responsibly.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Emperor suggests reviewing control, rigidity, power struggles.

name: The Hierophant
meaning_upright_long: Seek guidance in shared knowledge and rituals, while remembering to keep them meaningful to you.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Hierophant suggests reviewing rebellion, dogma, restriction.

name: The Lovers
meaning_upright_long: Relationships mirror your ideals; choose with integrity and honour your heart's truth.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Lovers suggests reviewing misalignment, imbalance, temptation.

name: The Chariot
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: scattered energy, aggression, lack of direction.
meaning_upright_long: Harness discipline to steer conflicting forces toward a shared destination and triumph.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Chariot suggests reviewing scattered energy, aggression, lack of direction.

name: Strength
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: self-doubt, fear, raw emotion.
meaning_upright_long: Gentle persistence and empathy tame fears more effectively than force alone ever could.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Strength suggests reviewing self-doubt, fear, raw emotion.

name: The Hermit
meaning_upright_long: Retreat to listen to your own voice and carry its lantern back to light the path forward.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Hermit suggests reviewing withdrawal, loneliness, isolation.

name: Wheel of Fortune
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: resistance, unexpected setbacks, control.
meaning_upright_long: Life turns in constant motion; adapt with grace and you can ride the wave of change.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Wheel of Fortune suggests reviewing resistance, unexpected setbacks, control.

name: Justice
meaning_upright_long: Decisions carry consequence—act with honesty and weigh all sides before moving ahead.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Justice suggests reviewing bias, dishonesty, avoidance.

name: The Hanged Man
meaning_upright_long: Letting go of control clears space for insight and transforms limbo into awakening.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Hanged Man suggests reviewing stalling, resistance, martyrdom.

name: Death
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: stagnation, fear of change, clinging.
meaning_upright_long: Release what has reached its conclusion to welcome a revitalising chapter.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Death suggests reviewing stagnation, fear of change, clinging.

name: Temperance
meaning_upright_long: Blend opposing elements thoughtfully to craft a harmonious and sustainable rhythm.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Temperance suggests reviewing excess, imbalance, restlessness.

name: The Devil
meaning_upright_long: Notice the chains you accept; conscious choice can dissolve limiting patterns.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Devil suggests reviewing liberation, awareness, detachment.

name: The Tower
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: averted disaster, denial, fear of change.
meaning_upright_long: Sudden clarity dismantles unstable foundations so that stronger truth can emerge.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Tower suggests reviewing averted disaster, denial, fear of change.

name: The Star
meaning_upright_long: A calm beacon reminds you to replenish your spirit and trust that renewal is near.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Star suggests reviewing discouragement, doubt, over-giving.

name: The Moon
meaning_upright_long: Shadows distort the path—listen to subtle cues and move slowly until truth surfaces.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Moon suggests reviewing confusion, anxiety, revelation.

name: The Sun
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: delayed gratification, overconfidence, temporary cloudiness.
meaning_upright_long: Warmth, clarity, and celebration radiate outward when you act from authentic confidence.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The Sun suggests reviewing delayed gratification, overconfidence, temporary cloudiness.

name: Judgement
meaning_upright_long: Answer the call to evolve; honest reflection frees you to step into purpose.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Judgement suggests reviewing self-doubt, avoidance, stagnation.

name: The World
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: loose ends, incompletion, delays.
meaning_upright_long: Celebrate milestones and recognise the mastery earned through the journey's cycle.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed The World suggests reviewing loose ends, incompletion, delays.

name: Ace of Wands
meaning_reversed_short: Reversed themes: blocked start, burnout, frustration.
meaning_upright_long: A seed of opportunity arrives, eager to grow if nurtured with intention. Expressed through the realm of wands, it highlights passion, invention, and the spark that propels ideas into action.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Ace of Wands suggests reviewing blocked start, burnout, frustration, impulsiveness, misuse, uncertainty.

name: Two of Wands
meaning_upright_long: Two forces seek harmony, calling for cooperation and mindful decision making. Expressed through the realm of wands, it highlights passion, invention, and the spark that propels ideas into action.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Two of Wands suggests reviewing burnout, frustration, imbalance, impulsiveness, indecision, stalemate.

name: Three of Wands
meaning_upright_long: Community and planning turn early efforts into meaningful progress. Expressed through the realm of wands, it highlights passion, invention, and the spark that propels ideas into action.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Three of Wands suggests reviewing burnout, delay, frustration, impulsiveness, misalignment.

name: Four of Wands
meaning_upright_long: Structures provide security, yet must be refreshed to avoid complacency. Expressed through the realm of wands, it highlights passion, invention, and the spark that propels ideas into action.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Four of Wands suggests reviewing burnout, frustration, impulsiveness, restlessness, rigidity, stagnation.

name: Five of Wands
meaning_upright_long: Tension invites adaptation, forging resilience through discomfort. Expressed through the realm of wands, it highlights passion, invention, and the spark that propels ideas into action.
meaning_reversed_long: Reversed Five of Wands suggests reviewing avoidance, burnout, frustration, impulsiveness, lingering conflict, recovery.
